games.title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
games.description: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt is a story-driven open world RPG set in a visually stunning fantasy universe full of meaningful choices and impactful consequences.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel CPU Core i5-2500K 3.3GHz / AMD CPU Phenom II X4 940
systemRequirements.graphics: Nvidia GPU GeForce GTX 660 / AMD GPU Radeon HD 7870

games.title: Red Dead Redemption 2
games.description: Winner of over 175 Game of the Year Awards and recipient of over 250 perfect scores, RDR2 is an epic tale of outlaw life in America.

systemRequirements.graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 6GB / AMD Radeon RX 480 4GB

games.title: Civilization VI
games.description: Civilization VI is the newest installment in the award-winning Civilization franchise. Expand your empire across the map, advance your culture, and compete against history's greatest leaders.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i3 2.5 Ghz or AMD Phenom II 2.6 Ghz or greater
systemRequirements.graphics: 1 GB & AMD 5570 or nVidia 450 or Intel Integrated Graphics 530

games.title: The Sims 4
games.description: Enjoy the power to create and control people in a virtual world where there are no rules. Express your creativity as you customize your Sims' appearances and personalities.

systemRequirements.os: 64 Bit Required. Windows 7 (SP1), Windows 8, Windows 8.1, or Windows 10
systemRequirements.processor: 1.8 GHz Intel Core 2 Duo, AMD Athlon 64 Dual-Core 4000+ or equivalent
systemRequirements.graphics: 128 MB of Video RAM and support for Pixel Shader 3.0

games.title: Elden Ring
games.description: THE NEW FANTASY ACTION RPG. Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring and become an Elden Lord in the Lands Between.

systemRequirements.processor: INTEL CORE I5-8400 or AMD RYZEN 3 3300X
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GEFORCE GTX 1060 3 GB or AMD RADEON RX 580 4 GB

games.title: Minecraft
games.description: Minecraft is a game about placing blocks and going on adventures. Explore randomly generated worlds and build amazing things from the simplest of homes to the grandest of castles.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i3-3210 3.2 GHz / AMD A8-7600 APU 3.1 GHz or equivalent
systemRequirements.graphics: Intel HD Graphics 4000 or AMD Radeon R5 series

games.title: God of War
games.description: His vengeance against the Gods of Olympus years behind him, Kratos now lives as a man in the realm of Norse Gods and monsters.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel i5-2500k (4 core 3.3 GHz) or AMD Ryzen 3 1200 (4 core 3.1 GHz)
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 960 (4 GB) or AMD R9 290X (4 GB)

games.title: Stardew Valley
games.description: You've inherited your grandfather's old farm plot in Stardew Valley. Armed with hand-me-down tools and a few coins, you set out to begin your new life.
